original_statement: which party was in office the most?
mutated_statement: which something was doing something the most?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Predicate/action replacement + Semantic generalization: "party" → "something" (specific political actor → vague placeholder) | "was in office" → "was doing something" (specific stative predicate → generic activity placeholder) (which party was in office the most? → which something was doing something the most?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述：Agent在judge_thought写道“Interpreting the question as asking which party appears most frequently...”并在iteration 0的simple_query thought中直接给出各党派计数（Republican 27、Democrat 20等）并断定Republican最多。表现为未提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，未请求澄清，也未在回答中使用任何模糊、假设或限制性说明。由于Agent直接按自己的默认理解（把“something/doing something”当作原始的“party/was in office”）去执行并返回具体答案，符合“未意识到指令模糊”的定义，因此归入此类。
